steps.title: Make a two-row table
steps.content: The point $(0,5)$ is on the graph. Since the slope is $\frac{1}{4}$, moving $4$ units right raises $y$ by $1$, so another point is $(4,6)$.

steps.title: Fit the equation in Desmos
steps.content: Run $y_1 \sim mx_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=0.25$ and $b=5$, so the equation is $f(x)=\frac{1}{4}x+5$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Choice A matches both the slope and intercept. Choice B has the wrong intercept, choice C has intercept $-\frac{5}{4}$, and choice D has intercept $-5$. Choice A is correct.
